channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 points to help Jazz rally past Rockets 124-115
item.description: Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz for a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: John Coon, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Aaron Rodgers talks 'factors' that will play into his decision on choosing new team
item.description: Aaron Rodgers is set to part ways with the New York Jets when the offseason officially begins. He revealed what he's looking for in a new team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool goes 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League after 2-0 win against Man City
item.description: At the home of Manchester City, Liverpool produced a performance worthy of champions to move 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: From 0 to 100 wins in 278 ski races: Mikaela Shiffrin’s 10 most notable World Cup victories
item.description: Ski star Mikaela Shiffrin has added yet another chapter to her book of World Cup records by becoming the first to reach the milestone of 100 career wins.
item.dc:creator: ERIC WILLEMSEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin gets historic 100th World Cup race win and ties record for most podiums
item.description: SESTRIERE, Italy (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin is 100% the best in skiing’s World Cup history book. Shiffrin’s record-extending 100th career World Cup race win Sunday fulfilled a quest put on hold by a serious crash in November.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Donovan Munger, former Ohio State player who won national title, dead at 30
item.description: Donovan Munger, a former Ohio State defensive lineman who was on the 2014 national title team, has died, his mother wrote on social media. He was 30.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Bishop's Schools 10, Carlsbad 8
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Water Polo Open Division Title came down to the final minute with Bishop's Schools prevailing 10-8 to win the title. For Coach Doug Peabody its 33rd CIF Title that includes boys and girls.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: NCS, CCS soccer playoffs: Saturday’s results, updated matchups
item.description: Scores from the Bay Area high school soccer playoffs on Saturday, plus next week's semifinals schedule.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Messi assists on Segovia's late goal, Inter Miami ties New York City FC 2-2 in MLS season opener
item.description: Telasco Segovia scored the tying goal on an assist by Lionel Messi in the 10th minute of stoppage time and Inter Miami played New York City FC to a 2-2 draw in their MLS opener.
item.dc:creator: Alanis Thames, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kylie Kravig Makes History as CMU’s All-Time Assists Leader
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — When the Colorado Mesa Mavericks need a play, there’s one player they trust to have the ball in her hands—Kylie Kravig. Kravig has been the floor general for the Mavericks all season, averaging six assists per game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Juan Soto hits a 426-foot home run in his first at-bat for the New York Mets
item.description: PORT ST. LUCIE, Fla. (AP) — Juan Soto wasted little time in showing off his power for his new team. Again. Soto homered in his first spring training at-bat for the New York Mets, hitting a solo shot to left-center field in the first inning against Houston on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Briscoe tries to move past devastating penalties and Blaney to start on pole in NASCAR Atlanta race
item.description: A massive fine left Chase Briscoe facing a huge points deficit heading into Sunday's NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta Motor Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Fox 5

item.title: Shelstad sends game to OT with a deep 3 as Oregon pulls out a 77-73 win vs. No. 11 Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Nate Bittle had 23 points and Jackson Shelstad made a desperation 3 to force overtime as Oregon beat No. 11 Wisconsin 77-73 on Saturday. Bittle, a 7-foot center, scored six points in overtime to help snap Wisconsin’s five-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: TAMIRA MADSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: There is a ‘renaissance’ in San Francisco, NBA commissioner says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- For the past few days, San Francisco was the center of the basketball universe. It was the first time in 25 years NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Right-hander Nick Pivetta, Padres finalize $55M four-year contract
item.description: Right-hander Nick Pivetta and the San Diego Padres officially announced a finalized $55 million, four-year contract on Monday, a backloaded deal that allows him to opt out after the 2026 and '27 seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Cubs manager Craig Counsell goes 1-on-1 with GN Sports from spring training
item.description: MESA, Ariz. — All baseball seasons are a roller-coaster ride to some degree, but Craig Counsell's first season as manager of the Cubs was especially up and down.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4
